title: Event format catalog
description: Reference table of the 9 format enum values with descriptions + which event_types they're compatible with. Loaded by the create form to filter format options based on event_type.

single_elimination.label: Single elimination
single_elimination.description: Loser is eliminated; single-loss elimination bracket. Requires 2^N participants ideally.

double_elimination.label: Double elimination
double_elimination.description: Two-loss elimination with winners' + losers' brackets. Requires 2^N participants.

round_robin.label: Round robin
round_robin.description: Every participant plays every other. Standings by points/wins. Doesn't scale beyond ~10 participants.

group_stage.label: Group stage
group_stage.description: Participants divided into groups, round-robin within group, top N advance. Common World-Cup-style format.

seeded_bracket.label: Seeded bracket
seeded_bracket.description: Bracketed matches with seeding based on ranking. Combines with single or double elimination.

clinic.label: Clinic
clinic.description: Instructor-led skills session. Attendees learn from a coach or expert.

lecture.label: Lecture
lecture.description: Presentation format. One-to-many talk with Q&A. Common for conferences + workshops.

social_only.label: Social
social_only.description: No competitive or instructional component. Community-building.
